scope.summary: Require explicit user intent before reading the keychain-backed SaaS cloud device token, and update startup/login copy so cloud device reconnect is not confused with local Zalo credential restore.
goals: Startup does not read the cloud device token from Keychain automatically
The login gate exposes an explicit continue action for previously linked cloud devices
Fresh magic-link verification still stores the SaaS device token in Keychain and connects
nonGoals: Moving the SaaS device token out of OS keychain
Adding a local Zalo credential restore path

acceptance.description: App startup and QR login gate initialization do not automatically call the cloud keychain lookup; startup copy says cloud device state instead of session restore.
A previously linked cloud device is represented by a non-secret marker and reconnects only through an explicit continue action.
Fresh magic-link verification still stores the SaaS device token through the existing Tauri command boundary, sets the non-secret linked-device marker, refreshes accounts, and connects cloud mode.
